title: Shortest Uncommon Substring in an Array
titleCn: 数组中的最短非公共子字符串

testcases.input: arr = ["cab","ad","bad","c"] Output: ["ab","","ba",""] Explanation: We have the following: - For the string "cab", the shortest substring that does not occur in any other string is either "ca" or "ab", we choose the lexicographically smaller substring, which is "ab". - For the string "ad", there is no substring that does not occur in any other string. - For the string "bad", the shortest substring that does not occur in any other string is "ba". - For the string "c", there is no substring that does not occur in any other string.
testcases.expectedOutput: ["ab","","ba",""] Explanation: We have the following: - For the string "cab", the shortest substring that does not occur in any other string is either "ca" or "ab", we choose the lexicographically smaller substring, which is "ab". - For the string "ad", there is no substring that does not occur in any other string. - For the string "bad", the shortest substring that does not occur in any other string is "ba". - For the string "c", there is no substring that does not occur in any other string.

testcases.input: arr = ["abc","bcd","abcd"] Output: ["","","abcd"] Explanation: We have the following: - For the string "abc", there is no substring that does not occur in any other string. - For the string "bcd", there is no substring that does not occur in any other string. - For the string "abcd", the shortest substring that does not occur in any other string is "abcd".
testcases.expectedOutput: ["","","abcd"] Explanation: We have the following: - For the string "abc", there is no substring that does not occur in any other string. - For the string "bcd", there is no substring that does not occur in any other string. - For the string "abcd", the shortest substring that does not occur in any other string is "abcd".
